introSection: '''Yahoo! Mountain''' was a steel kiddie roller coaster formerly located at Yahoo! Park in Jacaraípe, Espírito Santo, Brazil.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had a Wacky Worm layout.

fullText:
'''Yahoo! Mountain''' was a steel kiddie roller coaster formerly located at Yahoo! Park in Jacaraípe, Espírito Santo, Brazil.

The ride had a Wacky Worm layout.

Yellow track and gray supports.
